title: Rank Tracking
content_md:
# Rank Tracking

- Code: 3d4cf401
- Source: https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-mastery-pro/classroom/63a81f62?md=3d4cf401cd86415bbf6f4b7c5b195009
- Video: https://www.loom.com/share/95596f8c8c41404091314ac37ed17f89?sid=96a50ee6-24b4-400f-8b4b-59a891afbbdf?hide_owner=true&hide_share=true&hide_title=true&hideEmbedTopBar=true
- Duration: 5m 11s
- Resources:
  - [LeadSnap](https://app.leadsnap.com/register-caleb-ulku)

## Description

_(no description)_

transcript.text: All right, so let's talk about local rank tracking the tool that we use for local rank tracking is lead snap same tool that we use for citations and
Lead snap calls it a heat map all often refer to it as a local rank map
It's effectively the same thing so the way we do we come into heat map and I'm just gonna hit new to give you an example and
Let's just run one for plumber
Fort Wayne I
Love Fort Wayne, Indiana for some reason all right, and I'm just gonna grab one at random
Let's try Stanton plumbing so the way that this works and lead snap and obviously you can see you don't need
Access to the GVP to do this so I can put Stanton plumbing and we'll see if it pulls up
Several ones did we got Annapolis we got Millbury and we have white set Columbia
So great so I can hit can't find location and this particular one is in Fort Wayne, Indiana and
This one looks correct. Let's see 54 18 dial drive double check here 54 18 dial drive perfect
So that's the one so we'll select it. We'll come up to keywords and we'll say
Plumber Fort Wayne
Close and run scan the reviews and all this this happens like this it'll update correctly
Once it has a moment to okay
so what this is telling me the one in the middle is centered on the business address itself and
Basically, then if you were in the lobby of this business and you search for plumber Fort Wayne
This business would be in rank position number two as you move farther away
You can see their rank drops more and more one key factor for the ranking of Google Maps is proximity
This is this is an example of what that proximity means
So what we're trying to do in local SEO is grow this green circle to see more and more and more now
One of the reasons I really like lead snap like this is I can click on any one of these other
Competitors and pull up their rank map
So here we have stand plumbing, but if I wanted to see this one
You can see it pulls that straight up if I wanted to see this one pulls it straight up come back to stand plumbing
the other thing that I really like about lead snap is it's sorting it by
This information up here
Now the one that I really care about honestly is top three percent
Because if you're in the fourth position, no one can see you unless you hit more businesses
No one really does that unless they're an SEO
Doing research. So top three. This is the percent of this rank map that they're in the top three
So number one is in a 70 percent 50 percent 40 percent, etc in the top three
You can see this particular business is not in the top 25 for top. Maybe it is it says here than 16th
So anyway, I don't see him straight away. Not a problem. So they're average rank position
They're an 18th in this area top 3% then 16th and then market share is 16th also market share is
Basically, we've talked about this before where it's really really hard almost impossible to rank in a different city
Then the city or GBP is located in so market share is trying to estimate based on the
Competitors in your area who are doing really really well
How much you can possibly rank for if everything were perfect so you can see this first one
Lead snap is deciding the market share is matching basically the number one guy here. So
The best we could possibly do is this 68 and a half percent on the top three
So that's what that market share means. I'm usually focused on the top 3%
Clearly this can be an excellent prospecting tool
I very often will run these heat maps and email screen caps over to prospects
Along with screen caps of their top performing competitors, right? So who wouldn't be interested in SEO if they saw this is what you could look like and
We pulled up their map again for what they actually look like
Pretty powerful tool. The other thing you can do is set up reoccurring heat maps
To do the reoccurring ones you're going to come down to schedule and then in the top right
there is a new button you hit that new and again you just enter your business information and
You would enter your keywords that you're interested in and then you can make reoccurring
By just hitting the make reoccurring we can put a schedule in usually will do every other week
Just because a
Weekly scan is just more information than you need every other week is usually plenty sufficient
And then we can hit scheduling and keep an eye on this
We use this every month for an existing client to decide on content priorities for the next month
